requirement_topic.en: SEC Product Certification and Commercialization Authorization
requirement_topic.zh: SEC产品认证及商业化销售授权
requirement_topic.zht: SEC產品認證及商業化銷售授權

summary.en: Chile's SEC manages mandatory certification lists, product protocols, foreign-certificate recognition, and commercialization authorization for electrical products. For BESS, exporters should not assume a universal whole-unit BESS certificate; instead, determine whether listed components such as inverters, protection equipment, meters, cables, or other electrical products require SEC certification or authorization before sale or installation.
summary.zh: 智利SEC管理电气产品的强制认证清单、产品协议、外国证书认可及商业化销售授权。对于BESS，出口商不应假定存在统一的整机BESS证书，而应逐项判断逆变器、保护设备、电表、电缆或其他电气产品等列名部件在销售或安装前是否需要SEC认证或授权。
summary.zht: 智利SEC管理電氣產品的強制認證清單、產品協議、外國證書認可及商業化銷售授權。對於BESS，出口商不應假定存在統一的整機BESS證書，而應逐項判斷逆變器、保護設備、電表、電纜或其他電氣產品等列名部件在銷售或安裝前是否需要SEC認證或授權。

standards_or_laws: SEC Productos con Obligatoriedad de Certificacion
SEC Autorizacion de Comercializacion de Productos que Utilizan o Transportan Electricidad

summary.en: China documentation commonly includes GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, inverter certificates, factory test reports, and battery module safety reports. These documents support technical review but do not by themselves prove Chile SEC product scope, Chilean certification, or authorization to commercialize regulated electrical products.
summary.zh: 中国资料通常包括GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、逆变器证书、出厂试验报告和电池模块安全报告。这些资料可支持技术审查，但本身不能证明智利SEC产品适用范围、智利认证或受管电气产品的销售授权。
summary.zht: 中國資料通常包括GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、逆變器證書、出廠試驗報告和電池模組安全報告。這些資料可支持技術審查，但本身不能證明智利SEC產品適用範圍、智利認證或受管電氣產品的銷售授權。

gap.en: Prepare a Chile product-scope matrix by component, with HS codes, ratings, applicable SEC protocol checks, foreign certificates, test reports, Spanish labels and manuals, and a decision on certification, foreign-certificate recognition, or commercialization authorization where no authorized certification body route exists.
gap.zh: 应按部件准备智利产品适用范围矩阵，包括HS编码、额定参数、适用SEC协议核查、外国证书、测试报告、西班牙语标签和手册，并在无授权认证机构路径时判断是否需要认证、外国证书认可或商业化销售授权。
gap.zht: 應按部件準備智利產品適用範圍矩陣，包括HS編碼、額定參數、適用SEC協議核查、外國證書、測試報告、西班牙語標籤和手冊，並在無授權認證機構路徑時判斷是否需要認證、外國證書認可或商業化銷售授權。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only for products and components within SEC mandatory certification or authorization scope; do not overclaim a universal whole-BESS mandatory certificate
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or voluntary depending on the Chinese product category, project use, and applicable GB / GB/T / certification route

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Chile SEC compliance as a component-by-component scope exercise. China GB and factory documents are useful inputs but do not replace SEC certification, recognition, or commercialization authorization where a regulated electrical product is in scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智利SEC合规应按部件逐项判定适用范围。中国GB和工厂文件是有用输入，但不能替代受管电气产品适用时的SEC认证、认可或商业化销售授权。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智利SEC合規應按部件逐項判定適用範圍。中國GB和工廠文件是有用輸入，但不能替代受管電氣產品適用時的SEC認證、認可或商業化銷售授權。
